programmes.show_description: Feastmode. An unlikely alliance scores the challenge's first big-game kill. Suzanne risks her survival, and out hunting, Ryan is surrounded by deadly predators. S5, Ep6
A Matter Of Life Or Seth. Scorching heat punishes Suzanne as she goes it alone. A potential snake attack could be Seth's first African food win and Bulent takes on a lizard. S5, Ep7
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Drayton Mill. The Dawgs travel to the Drayton Mill in Spartanburg, South Carolina. Key items include a large fan and valves. Mike builds a new desk out of a salvaged airplane wing. S5, Ep1
Former First National Bank. The team take on the former first National Bank in Gastonia, North Carolina. Items salvaged include elevator parts and chicken wire windows. S5, Ep2
Hello Heartache. With three days left in the season, miners are pushed to the brink, risking sleep, safety, and sanity to dredge maximum gold. Will Shawn's master plan succeed? S5, Ep23
Goodbye Nome. The weather is warming fast as the ice season closes and the miners rush to secure their futures. On the Clark, Zeke's hunt for a paystreak has him at breaking point. S5, Ep24
The Victoria Diggers might have found a multi-million-dollar load, but they need help extracting it. The Scrappers continue to struggle with broken machines. S4, Ep9
White Wolf Of Newfoundland. Forrest teams up with an expert in Newfoundland seeking the white wolf, which was declared extinct in 1930. They meet a hunter convinced he shot one. S1, Ep2
Exit Wounds. In the midst of a rough King Crab season, a mutiny transpires on the Cornelia Marie while mental and physical breakdowns plague the crew of the Kodiak. S7, Ep6
Thick As Thieves. The police are called in after a confrontation on the Cornelia Marie while a debilitating injury to a Kodiak deckhand ends his career for good. S7, Ep7
Aliens on Terrarosa. Adam and Evan tackle the rugged terrain of the Terrarosa Glacier where a local and well-known prospector was threatened by a mysterious force. S1, Ep2
The Lost Tomb Of Attila The Hun. Josh travels to Hungary to look for the lost tomb of Attila the Hun. Legends lead the search to the mountain forests just outside of Budapest. S3, Ep2
The Vanished Empire. Josh Gates travels to Greece to find out exactly how the mighty Minoan civilization disappeared from the ancient world. S3, Ep3
Hog Heaven And Homestead Hell. The Raneys answer an SOS from a family displaced by their failing homestead. Matt teaches an ill mother how to face her fear of invasive hogs. S3, Ep7
Treehouse Of Terror. The Raneys tackle a treehouse cabin on the verge of collapse in Missouri. Marty overhauls the entire base of the cabin, while Misty constructs a greenhouse. S3, Ep8
A Well That Takes On Water. The Digi Diggers need to explore new ground after mining opal too brittle to sell. The Bushmen find their new claim has been dug out by opal thieves. S6, Ep4
Bad Luck. The Opal Whispers are forced to leave behind a rich opal seam in a mine on the verge of collapse. The Cheals are cut off from their mine by crippling floods. S6, Ep5
Crushing Blows. Wild Bill gets the truth about Nick's terminal illness. A damaging mechanical issue threatens to crush Jake's future and warming seas force Keith into the unknown. S13, Ep4
Bad Moon. Johnathan and Andy fish together for the last time. Keith's inattentive crew sends the Wizard on a collision course and an angry deckhand tests Jake's resolve. S13, Ep5
The crew race to help a man crushed by a lawnmower and a rider thrown from a horse. Plus, a driver needs an urgent airlift after a road accident. S2, Ep7
The crew is baffled by a man's mystery collapse and fear the worst at a motorbike crash. At a rugby match, a player has a suspected head injury. S2, Ep8
The Ferals confront a gold thief who's raided their lease. The Gold Retrievers explore a promising new lease, while Jacqui and Andrew get their big break. S7, Ep10
Keep Your Frenemies Close. Wes scores another kill, but when a large group enters their camp, tensions flare. Bulent migrates to Seth's watering hole, will the two join forces? S5, Ep8
Third Times The Harm. Wes and the team get their third big-game kill, but the victory quickly becomes a dangerous medical situation. Plus, Bulent is tested by a heat wave. S5, Ep9

Teleshopping.
Covington Church. The Dawgs work on Covington church and find tambour doors, stairs and a jukebox. Mike and Tay build a locker bench, then the crew finds a propane spotlight. S5, Ep3
Rising Sun Ranch. The Dawgs tackle a ranch house in Alderson, West Virginia. Salvaged items include stained glass and corbels. In the shop, Mike reuses timber to build a beam table. S5, Ep4
Now Or Never. A crushing injury requires Coast Guard rescue. Josh and Casey face a huge loss when their offload gets cancelled, and Monte hauls more crab than the Wizard can hold. S15, Ep22
Cold War Rivals. A dramatic change in the Russian crab industry rocks global markets and sparks new competition. As crab prices grow, legendary captains return to claim their piece. S16, Ep1
Typhoon Hagibis. As the fleet begins its race against the Russians, ferocious typhoon Hagibis hits the Bering Sea. Captains must choose whether to risk their lives for a big payday. S16, Ep2
Honestly Shared. The Misfits discover they're losing precious opal, so they attempt a dangerous night dig with an excavator and ultraviolet blacklights. S6, Ep14
Hard On The Edge. The Bushmen's home-made hoist and bucket fails. The Opal Whisperers, Sofia and Isaac, get trapped at the bottom of their open cut mine in sweltering temperatures. S6, Ep15
The Foreign Claim. Isaac from the Opal Whisperers works an abandoned, dangerous mine. The Mooka Boys are confronted by an irate miner as they peg a claim too close to his mine. S6, Ep16
Red Lead Redemption. Kyle Archer and his team must work an abandoned drive reclaimed by rainforest. Frankie and Ebriony's garnet expedition is cut short by bushfires. S2, Ep7
From The Pinnacle To The Pit. Jarrin and Hugh hunt for anything and everything in the walls of their mine. The Neils risk life and limb against deadly boulders at 'Topaz Mountain'. S2, Ep8
Three groups of sapphire hunters encounter big problems underground. A lack of water, wrong turns and big machines all cause issues for the teams. S1, Ep1
The Dust Devils are poised to smash the biggest season tally ever. The Gold Timers hit paydirt. The Gold Gypsies' gold dream could finally be over. S5, Ep19
The Gold Gypsies have more bad luck. The Victoria Diggers face a death in the family. The Poseidon Crew hope to continue their run of big gold. S5, Ep20
The Dust Devils face a nightmare journey to their remote mining lease. The Ferals are set a huge gold target, and the Poseidon Crew find a nugget. S6, Ep1
Everything Is at Stake. Cheryl's hoarding alienated her family and now threatens her marriage, while single mum Michelle's collecting has reached crisis point. Can they be helped? S1, Ep7
A Million Excuses. Mike and Kim's compulsive shopping has ruined their home and isolated their sons, while Mike's efforts to mask his obsessive collecting as a hobby fools no-one. S1, Ep8
Dog's Spirit In California. Children interact with ghosts and a woman gets one last goodbye from her faithful furry friend. Plus, hundreds of orbs swarm in the moonlight. S7, Ep10
Los Feliz Murder House Part 2. The crew confront a dark presence that haunts an abandoned mansion in LA. They conduct an ancient Sumerian ritual to open gates to the other side. S20, Ep21
Lovelock Triangle. Zak and the crew visit a mysterious Nevada town plagued by paranormal activity. Is a murdered witch's curse responsible for the haunting? S20, Ep22
